requests.planner_visual_prompt: Begin from a calm, static scene: the real portable LED lamp from the provided reference image sits centered on a clean, light wood desk. To its left is a small beige canvas travel pouch with a simple zipper, resting flat. Behind them is a soft off-white wall in gentle daylight. No hand or person is visible in this first moment. After a brief beat, a single adult right hand in a neutral oatmeal knit sleeve enters from the right. The hand gently grasps the lamp, lifts it and slowly rotates it once, showing its compact, palmable size above the desk. The hand then sets the lamp back down near the pouch. As soon as it rests on the desk, the lamp softly illuminates, casting a warm amber pool of light across the wood surface and lightly touching the pouch. The hand withdraws. The camera makes a subtle, slow push-in toward the glowing lamp and pouch, holding on the cozy, warm light for a calm finish. Keep the desk, pouch, and wall consistent throughout, with no additional objects introduced.
requests.overlay_text: Compact carry. Soft warm glow. Desk • Bedside • Travel.
requests.audio_direction: Soft, warm ambient music bed; a subtle, pleasant chime or swell as the lamp lights up; no voiceover.
